question: Is the main label text "MOUNTAIN MIST OOLONG TEA" spelled correctly?

Is the brewing guide text "Brewing Guide: Use 3 grams of tea leaves with 150 milliliters of hot water; let steep for approximately 90 seconds before pouring; may be re-steeped multiple times; first smell the aroma, then taste slowly for best experience" spelled correctly?
Is the brewing guide text rendered in a serif typeface on a side description strip?

Is the flavor notes text "Flavor Notes: Fresh floral aroma with a long-lasting sweet aftertaste; perfect for morning reading sessions or late-night writing; if the taste feels too strong, simply reduce the amount of tea leaves used" spelled correctly?
